pages.text: Palesa can’t sleep. It’s her birthday tomorrow. She’s one year old!

blocks.text: Palesa can’t sleep. It’s her birthday tomorrow. She’s one year old!

pages.text: All her friends will bring her lots of presents.

blocks.text: All her friends will bring her lots of presents.

pages.text: Seth will bring a... What will Seth bring? A rattle! And Sandile? A drum!

blocks.text: Seth will bring a... What will Seth bring? A rattle! And Sandile? A drum!

pages.text: But what about Aunty Mamsie? Oh, she’ll bring a cake, balloons, a trumpet, a talking doll, a computer, and ... and ... and ...

blocks.text: But what about Aunty Mamsie? Oh, she’ll bring a cake, balloons, a trumpet, a talking doll, a computer, and ... and ... and ...

pages.text: TRII-IING-TRII-IING! “Happy birthday!” comes from the door. “Come in! Come in!” Mommy shouts.

blocks.text: TRII-IING-TRII-IING! “Happy birthday!” comes from the door. “Come in! Come in!” Mommy shouts.

pages.text: On her stool, Palesa’s eyes grow bigger and bigger.

blocks.text: On her stool, Palesa’s eyes grow bigger and bigger.

pages.text: Over there, against the wall, the pile of toys grows and grows and grows.

blocks.text: Over there, against the wall, the pile of toys grows and grows and grows.

pages.text: “Mine!” Palesa screams. “Mine!” she waves her angry arms. But everybody’s busy playing.

blocks.text: “Mine!” Palesa screams. “Mine!” she waves her angry arms. But everybody’s busy playing.

pages.text: “MINE!” And, with one big heave, pushes herself up. She goes and gathers the toys.

blocks.text: “MINE!” And, with one big heave, pushes herself up. She goes and gathers the toys.

pages.text: Everybody stops. Then they all clap their hands. “Hurray! Palesa can walk!”

blocks.text: Everybody stops. Then they all clap their hands. “Hurray! Palesa can walk!”

pages.text: Look! Now everyone is happy. Palesa is happy to play with her friends.

blocks.text: Look! Now everyone is happy. Palesa is happy to play with her friends.
